---
title: "Slave labor, climate change, and worker health in Brazilian agriculture: cases from Maranhão, Rio de Janeiro, and Mato Grosso"
description: ""
draft: false
draft-mode: visible
date: "2025-10-09"
date-modified: "2025-10-09"
image: img/cover-en.png
execute:
  echo: false
citation:
  url: in progress
lang: en  
categories:
  - Workers Health
  - Climate change
  - Human Rights
  - Decent Work
  
author:
  - name: Luís Leão
    url: https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/research/beacons-of-excellence/rights-lab/index.aspx
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Fluminense
    affiliation-url: https://www.uff.br
    orcid: 0000-0003-0166-5066
  - name: Edgar Rodriguez-Huerta
    url: https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/research/beacons-of-excellence/rights-lab/our-team/edgar-rodr%C3%ADguez-huerta/index.aspx
    affiliation: University of Nottingham, Rights Lab
    affiliation-url: https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/research/beacons-of-excellence/rights-lab/index.aspx
    orcid: 0000-0002-6887-0040    
  - name: Todd Landman
    url: https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/research/beacons-of-excellence/rights-lab/index.aspx
    affiliation: University of Nottingham, Rights Lab
    affiliation-url: https://www.nottingham.ac.uk/research/beacons-of-excellence/rights-lab/index.aspx
    orcid: 0000-0002-0281-7263
  - name: Flávia de Almeida Moura
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Moura.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal de Maranhão
    affiliation-url: https://portalpadrao.ufma.br
    orcid: 
  - name: Isabel Domingos Martinez dos Santos
    url: https://www.clidewo.com/people/staff/Domingos.html
    affiliation: Universidade Federal Fluminense
    affiliation-url: https://www.uff.br
    orcid:    
---


This article presents part of a research that seeks to approach and reflect on the daily life and work of people and groups inserted in the economic cycle of Brazilian agriculture, highlighting challenges related to climatic changes and working conditions, which may be producers of vulnerabilities and adaptation of populations that live in the sector. Maranhão, Mato Grosso and Rio de Janeiro.

Elaborated for the book organised by GPTEC (Grupo de Pesquisa Trabalho Escravo Contemporâneo), linked to UFRJ (Universidade Federal do Rio de Janeiro) in partnership with UFMT (Universidade Federal do Mato Grosso). It is anticipated that it will be published by the end of the first semester of 2026.

<br/><br/>


### Download {.appendix}

It is anticipated that it will be published by the end of the first semester of 2026.

{{< downloadthis img/404.pdf dname=404 label="Download the pdf" icon=file-earmark-pdf type=Warning >}}

#### Share it on social media:

```{=html}
<!-- AddToAny BEGIN -->
<div class="a2a_kit a2a_kit_size_32 a2a_default_style" data-a2a-icon-color="#FFDC02,black">

<a class="a2a_button_email a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_copy_link a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_linkedin a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_facebook a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_bluesky a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_x a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_threads a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_mastodon a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_button_whatsapp a2a_counter"></a>
<a class="a2a_dd a2a_counter" href="https://www.addtoany.com/share"></a>
</div>
<script async src="https://static.addtoany.com/menu/page.js"></script>
<!-- AddToAny END -->
```
